basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 19 Full Time Specialist, Senior Residents and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Full-Time Specialist / Part-Time Specialists / Senior Residents
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation Hospital Udaipur (ESIC Hospital Udaipur) Full-Time Specialist / Part-Time Specialists / Senior Residents Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Employees' State Insurance Corporation . A total of 19 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Full-Time Specialist / Part-Time Specialists / Senior Residents Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Full Time/Part Time Specialist: Maximum 67 years. Senior Resident: Maximum 45 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST - 5 years, OBC - 3 years, PwBD - 10/13/15 years.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS, Post Graduate Degree/Diploma (MD/MS/DNB) in relevant specialty, Valid MCI/NMC/State Medical Council registration
qualification.details: Full-Time Specialist / Part-Time Specialists: MBBS + MD/MS/DNB in the concerned specialty. For FTS posts, 3 years of experience after PG or 5 years after Diploma is required. Senior Residents: MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in the concerned specialty. Valid MCI/NMC/State Medical Council registration is mandatory for all posts.

salary_details.details: Full-Time Specialist: Rs. 1,14,955/- to Rs. 1,33,802/- consolidated per month. Part-Time Specialists: Rs. 60,000/- consolidated per month + emergency call charges. Senior Residents: Rs. 67,700/- (Level 11) + NPA, DA, HRA, TA etc. as per 7th CPC.

selection_process: Document Verification Interview before Selection Committee

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Udaipur?
faq.answer: The advertisement is valid until 31 December 2026, and regular walk-in interviews are held on the third Thursday of every month. The first walk-in interview is scheduled for 18 May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in ESIC Udaipur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 19 vacancies for Full-Time Specialists, Part-Time Specialists, and Senior Residents posts at ESIC Hospital Udaipur.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree along with a Post Graduate Degree/Diploma (MD/MS/DNB) in the relevant specialty. Valid medical council registration is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for Full-Time/Part-Time Specialists is 67 years, and for Senior Residents, it is 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for ESIC Udaipur recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 500/- for General and OBC categories. SC/ST candidates are exempted from paying any application fee.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary ranges from Rs. 60,000/- to Rs. 1,33,802/- per month, depending on the post and experience. Senior Residents will be paid as per the 7th CPC norms.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the ESIC Udaipur recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Eligible candidates need to report at the specified venue on the interview date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry original and self-attested photocopies of their ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable).

faq.question: Q9. Where is the ESIC Hospital Udaipur located?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Udaipur is located in Udaipur, Rajasthan, with the pincode 313001.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification followed by an Interview conducted by a Selection Committee.
